ddls:
CREATE TABLE "systems" (
  "system_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each system */,
  "system_name" TEXT /* Name of the project management system */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the system */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the system was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the system was last updated */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the system */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the system (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("system_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_interfaces" (
  "interface_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interface */,
  "system_id" INTEGER /* ID of the system the interface belongs to */,
  "interface_name" TEXT /* Name of the interface (e.g., Web, Mobile web, Email) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the interface */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the interface was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the interface was last updated */,
  "is_enabled" INTEGER /* Whether the interface is enabled */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interface_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_system_interfaces_system_id FOREIGN KEY ("system_id") REFERENCES systems ("system_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "system_id" INTEGER /* ID of the system the project belongs to */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project was last updated */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the project (e.g., active, completed, on hold) */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* Project management methodology (e.g., agile, scrum, waterfall) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_system_id FOREIGN KEY ("system_id") REFERENCES systems ("system_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "issues" (
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each issue */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the issue belongs to */,
  "issue_name" TEXT /* Name of the issue */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the issue */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the issue (e.g., open, closed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the issue was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the issue was last updated */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority of the issue (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the issue (e.g., minor, major, critical) */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the issue (e.g., bug, feature request, task) */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date for the issue */,
  "estimated_hours" INTEGER /* Estimated hours to resolve the issue */,
  "actual_hours" INTEGER /* Actual hours spent on the issue */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("issue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "issue_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the issue the comment belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment text */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment was last updated */,
  "is_private" INTEGER /* Whether the comment is private */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issue_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issue_comments_issue_id FOREIGN KEY ("issue_id") REFERENCES issues ("issue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "issue_assignees" (
  "assignee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignee */,
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the issue the assignee belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user assigned to the issue */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the assignee was assigned */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the assignee was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the assignee is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issue_assignees_issue_id FOREIGN KEY ("issue_id") REFERENCES issues ("issue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issue_assignees_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, developer) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the user is active */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration */,
  "system_id" INTEGER /* ID of the system the configuration belongs to */,
  "config_key" TEXT /* Key of the configuration */,
  "config_value" TEXT /* Value of the configuration */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the configuration was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the configuration was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the configuration is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_system_configurations_system_id FOREIGN KEY ("system_id") REFERENCES systems ("system_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the metadata belongs to */,
  "metadata_key" TEXT /* Key of the metadata */,
  "metadata_value" TEXT /* Value of the metadata */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metadata was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metadata was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the metadata is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_metadata_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "issue_workflow" (
  "workflow_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each workflow */,
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the issue the workflow belongs to */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the issue */,
  "transition" TEXT /* Transition of the issue */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the workflow was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the workflow was last updated */,
  "transitioned_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the transition was made */,
  "transitioned_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the transition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("workflow_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issue_workflow_issue_id FOREIGN KEY ("issue_id") REFERENCES issues ("issue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issue_workflow_transitioned_by FOREIGN KEY ("transitioned_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the notification belongs to */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message of the notification */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was last updated */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Whether the notification has been read */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "integrations" (
  "integration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each integration */,
  "system_id" INTEGER /* ID of the system the integration belongs to */,
  "tool_name" TEXT /* Name of the tool */,
  "api_key" TEXT /* API key for the tool */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the integration was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the integration was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the integration is active */,
  "last_sync" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last synchronization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("integration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_integrations_system_id FOREIGN KEY ("system_id") REFERENCES systems ("system_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log */,
  "system_id" INTEGER /* ID of the system the log belongs to */,
  "log_level" TEXT /* Level of the log */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message of the log */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the log was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the log was last updated */,
  "log_source" TEXT /* Source of the log (e.g., system, user, integration) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_logs_system_id FOREIGN KEY ("system_id") REFERENCES systems ("system_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "api_keys" (
  "api_key_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each API key */,
  "system_id" INTEGER /* ID of the system the API key belongs to */,
  "api_key" TEXT /* API key */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the API key */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the API key was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the API key was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the API key is active */,
  "last_used" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last use of the API key */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("api_key_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_api_keys_system_id FOREIGN KEY ("system_id") REFERENCES systems ("system_id")
)
